curation_notes: Patch commit found directly from advisory reference (jenkinsci/ontrack-plugin@7f0f806). The patch modifies 2 source files (AbstractDSLLauncher.java and SandboxDSLLauncher.java) plus pom.xml (dependency version bump). Locations derived from the patch diff: the run() method in AbstractDSLLauncher parsed scripts before sandboxing, and the overridden run() in SandboxDSLLauncher passed the pre-parsed Script object to GroovySandbox.run() instead of the raw source string, allowing sandbox bypass.
